     The Numbers Business Report

Ordinary Angels (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,174,421Details
International Box Office $1,280,066
Worldwide Box Office $20,454,487
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $864,051
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $703,997
Total $1,568,048
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Sharon Steves is a fierce but struggling hairdresser in small-town Kentucky who discovers a renewed sense of purpose when she meets Ed Schmitt, a widower working hard to make ends meet for his two daughters. With his youngest daughter waiting for a liver transplant, Sharon sets her mind to helping the family and will move mountains to do it. What unfolds is a tale of faith, everyday miracles, and ordinary angels.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,163,600 (32.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.11 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:93.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$13,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,020 opening theaters/3,020 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $20,276,398

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 23rd, 2024 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: March 14th, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
March 15th, 2024 (Limited) (New Zealand)
March 28th, 2024 (Limited), released as Anjos na Terra (Portugal)
April 26th, 2024 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
May 10th, 2024 (Limited) (Finland)
Video Release: March 26th, 2024 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for thematic content, brief bloody images and smoking.
(Rating bulletin 2794 (cert #54165), 8/2/2023)
Running Time: 116 minutes
Filming location (country): Canada, United States
Filming location (state or county): New York, United States
Plot point: Biography, Medical and Hospitals
Subgenre: Faith-Based Drama
Time period setting: 1990s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Kingdom Story Company, Vertigo Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Sharon Steves is a fierce but struggling hairdresser in small-town Kentucky who discovers a renewed sense of purpose when she meets Ed Schmitt, a widower working hard to make ends meet for his two daughters. With his youngest daughter waiting for a liver transplant, Sharon sets her mind to helping the family and will move mountains to do it. What unfolds is a tale of faith, everyday miracles, and ordinary angels.
